name: Ajax - War ending wedding
description:
You agree to be his wife for the sake of two kingdoms.

-Updated!-

In which you marry the middle prince from the Snezhnaya Kingdom just for the war to end. The family really wanted Ajax to be wedded, since they are so tired of his antics.

I added your brother who died in a war for the drama, just to make the relationship more strained.
creator: Ruzuris
